rulings.Case Title: RONALD REDMAN et al VS. A. W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, NOVEMBER 20, 2006, LINE 9, DEFENDANT VELAN VALVE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN 1)DISCOVERY NOT FACTUALLY DEVOID; REDMAN IDENTIFIES VELAN PRODUCT; DESCRIBES EXPOSURE OVERALL; MOVING PARTY FAILS TO ADDRESS EXPOSURE FROM OTHER THAN VALVES 2)SEPARATE STATEMENT RE FALSE REPRESENTATION AND INTENTIONAL TORT CAUSES OF ACTION AND PUNITIVES FAILS TO MEET CRC 342. IF SHIFTED WOULD GRANT 437C(H). =(302/REQ/AP)
